evals.name: first-session-mission
evals.prompt: Apply the teach skill. I want to learn Rust for writing CLI tools.
evals.expected_output: Interviews or drafts MISSION.md before dumping content; proposes a teaching workspace structure.
assertions: The output references or follows teach guidance
Asks about or records why the user wants to learn
References workspace artifacts like MISSION.md or lessons/

evals.name: continuing-session
evals.prompt: Apply the teach skill. Continue my learning — MISSION.md and learning-records/ already exist in this directory.
evals.expected_output: Reads existing state and proposes the next lesson in zone of proximal development.
assertions: Acknowledges prior learning records or mission
Proposes a single scoped next step or lesson
Does not restart from zero without reason

evals.name: resource-grounding
evals.prompt: Apply the teach skill. Teach me about PostgreSQL indexing for a production API.
evals.expected_output: Searches for or curates resources before teaching; cites sources in lesson plan.
assertions: Includes retrieval practice or feedback loop in lesson design
Scopes content to a tangible skill, not encyclopedic coverage
